name: portrait-hub
description: PortraitHub GPU 推理与人像智能服务

scripts.check: npm run check:legacy && npm run test:node && npm run console:check
scripts.check:legacy: node --check frontend/console/console.js && node --check frontend/console/api/client.js && node --check frontend/console/state/store.js && node --check frontend/console/renderers/data-viewer.js && node --check frontend/console/visuals/previews.js && node --check frontend/console/views/navigation.js && node --check frontend/console/templates/core.js && node --check frontend/console/templates/access.js && node --check frontend/console/templates/governance.js && node --check frontend/console/templates/index.js && node --check frontend/console/runtime/formatting.js && node --check frontend/console/runtime/network.js && node --check frontend/console/visuals/results.js && node --check frontend/console/views/analysis.js && node --check frontend/console/views/gallery.js && node --check frontend/console/views/operations.js && node --check frontend/console/views/access.js && node --check frontend/console/views/observability.js && node --check frontend/console/views/governance.js && node --check frontend/console/views/results.js && node --check frontend/console/views/dashboard.js && node --check frontend/console/views/app.js
scripts.console:generate: python tools/export_openapi.py && npm run generate -w @portrait-hub/console-next && npx prettier --write frontend/console-next/src/api/generated.ts
scripts.console:check: npm run console:lint && npm run console:test && npm run console:typecheck && npm run console:build
